description: Review pending todos and recommend action (handle as quick task, debug, or plan as phase)
prompt: Read @.planning/todos/pending/fix-utils-crash.md and @.planning/STATE.md. This is a pending todo in a GSD project. Analyze it and recommend one of: (1) Handle as quick task — simple fix, do it now; (2) Debug — needs investigation first; (3) Plan as phase — complex enough to warrant full planning. Explain your recommendation in 2-3 sentences. Output a JSON object: { recommendation: 'quick-task' | 'debug' | 'plan-phase', reasoning: '...' }
